creator: dima@unixfreak.org
text:
Josh Paetzel <jpaetzel@hutchtel.net> writes:
> >Fix:
> I sent a patch to the -docs mailing list.

I've fixed this.  Next time, please include the patch in the PR;
nobody wants to have to dig through deleted mail or the archives.
Also, the HTML files on the web site are generated from SGML/DocBook
files; it'd be nice if you could send patches against those instead.
